hi, so me and my friend made this bot to test the personality of a character we created for our comic book. i left the bot as public because i never though it would get much visibility. i was wrong. for those asking about naiara and why the user is seen as trans, it’s because i had included that information in Matteo’s personality. I’ve removed it now, so the bot should stop mentioning it.

thank you for using our bot!
